title: BackFunds: Boost your cash flow now
bodyHtml:
Launched in 2021, BackFunds accelerates your payouts and powers your growth on Back Market. We started with Storfund, a long-standing finance leader and have now expanded the offer with two new partners: LinkLogis and Hero, giving you more ways to get paid, faster.

 

Since then, we haven’t stopped making improvements: payouts now come weekly instead of every ten days. But we know some of you need cash even sooner. 


That’s why, with BackFunds, you can replenish stock quicker, keep inventory moving and maximize your profits.

 

On average, sellers using BackFunds grow 45% faster each year. It’s not just a service, it’s a real revenue driver.

 

Want to know how much faster you can get paid with BackFunds, or what it costs? 
Check out this comprehensive article to get all the details!

 

 

Jump to

  1.  What you should know about BackFunds
  2.  How does it work?
  3.  Our BackFunds partners and their main features
  4.  What does it cost?
  5.  Can I apply for BackFunds?
  6.  BackFunds Toolkit: Key Resources
  7.  Get started with BackFunds!
    ​​​

 

1. What you should know about BackFunds

As of today, the service offered by BackFunds (with the support of our partners) follows an advance payment model based on net sales.

 

Let’s clarify this financial model by highlighting 2 important points:

 

  • Advance payment models based on net sales can often be offered without specific lending or banking authorizations, because they are structured as a purchase of receivables, NOT as a loan. This distinction enables many financial providers to offer these services with fewer regulatory constraints.
  • Both legally and commercially, the commission applied by the BackFunds provider is structured as a pure service fee, NOT as interest.
    • Regulation: if the cost were classified as interest, the service could be regulated as a loan, triggering lending license and disclosure requirements.
    • Accounting & Tax: commissions are generally treated differently from interest in financial statements.

 A few additional details that relate to BackFunds and all our partners:

 

  • The BackFunds partner charges a fixed commission of your net sales. The rate will be negotiated directly between you and the BackFunds provider after you sign up.
  • No minimum contract length: you can stop the service whenever it suits you (as long as you don’t owe any amount to the BackFunds partner).
  • Multi-currency support: receive, hold, and pay out funds in multiple currencies at a low FX rate.
  • Transparent tracking: easily access a dedicated interface from the BackFunds provider with full details about your payment advance.

 

 

2. How does it work?

In 5 steps, here’s the path to access the BackFunds service.

 

Step 1 
Just keep selling as you normally do on Back Market, and once you sign up for the service (see 7. Get started with BackFunds!) and give your approval, we’ll take care of sending your sales and payment data to the BackFunds provider.


Step 2
You can receive up to 80% of the net value of your sales at the end of every day! The net value is calculated from the items you’ve shipped, minus any refunds and the Back Market commission.


Just a heads up: the percentage of 80% is shown because it’s the most common financing granted on BackFunds but it can vary based on the risk assessment from the BackFunds partner.

 

Step 3
Obtain the remaining 20% of your net earnings during the weekly payout cycle managed by Back Market. From this amount, the BackFunds provider will deduct its service fee for the advance payment services. The rate (get to know more about it in 4. What does it cost?) is negotiated directly between you and the BackFunds provider after you sign up.


Step 4
Once the rate is agreed and the risk team at our BackFunds provider has validated your onboarding (they may request some documents), our partner will open a joint bank account to collect your payments. The BackFunds provider will keep us updated every step of the way!

 

Step 5
We’ll update your account with the new banking details so the BackFunds provider can be reimbursed. Your onboarding with BackFunds is now complete.

 

If you ever wish to leave the service, we’ll simply switch your default bank account back.

 

You’re now all set to start receiving daily payments!

Ready to start? Go to Get started with BackFunds! and reach out to our partners.

 

 

4. What does it cost?

The BackFunds partner charges a fixed commission of your net sales. The exact rate will be negotiated directly between you and the BackFunds provider after you sign up.

 

As shown in the table above (see last table row in Our BackFunds partners and their main features), we’ve put together a simulation tool so you can easily get an idea of what the service might cost you.

 

Below are the pricing grids with daily rates, so you can get an idea of the commission that may apply to your situation.

 

 

BackFunds powered by Storfund

 

No subscription, no setup fee: pay for what you receive and stop whenever you want.

 

Storfund charges a fixed fee — equivalent to 0.3% or less per day — on the running total of your advances (see Advance Rate within the table shown in 3. Our BackFunds partners and their main features). This is the total amount of advances you’ve received that haven’t yet been repaid by Back Market payouts.

 

Click here to watch how it works!

 

On average, BackFunds users pay between 1% and 2% of their net sales annually (Net sales = Gross sales minus Back Market fees and refunds).

 

Sync your store data with Storfund, and they’ll run a fee simulation with your sales data so you can see exactly what you’ll pay.

 

To get in touch with Storfund, go to 7. Get started with BackFunds! 

 

BackFunds powered by Hero

 

Annual GMV

BackFunds’ fee

€120k-€1m

0.063 %

€1m-€5m

0.058 %

€5m+

0.055 %

 

Note that the commission applied above is daily and is calculated on net sales after Back Market commissions, generated on day D-1.

 

In addition to the service fees, there is a monthly fee of €39 for the creation of a Hero Pro bank account to collect Marketplace payments. Get more details here.

 

Concrete example (for a 12-day average payment delay for an order)
€1,000 incl. VAT in sales on Back Market
€850 incl. VAT in net sales after Back Market commissions
80% (financing rate) x €850 = €680 advanced the next day
For a cost equal to 0.063% x 12 days x €850 = €6.40

 

To get in touch with Hero, go to 7. Get started with BackFunds! 

 

 

 

BackFunds powered by LinkLogis

 

The BackFunds’ fee with LinkLogis ranges from 1% to 0.6%, depending on the monthly GMV generated.


Note that the above commission is applied to the net sales generated on D-1.

 

To get in touch with LinkLogis, go to 7. Get started with BackFunds! 

 

 

 

 

5. Can I apply for BackFunds?

There are a few basic criteria you’ll need to meet in order to use BackFunds. You must:

 

  • Be a registered company, a limited liability partnership, or a similar incorporated entity;
  • Have at least six months of business history on Back Market;
  • Achieve a monthly turnover of €10,000/£35,000/$40,000 on Back Market (based on the previous month’s figures);
  • Demonstrate solid qualitative KPIs, such as a low defect rate* (below 12%) and no suspensions due to breaches of the Back Market’s Quality Chart.
  • Be registered in the US, EEA or UK.

 

If you meet these criteria, you’re eligible for BackFunds!

 

 

All that’s left is to contact the right BackFunds provider (see section 7. Get started with BackFunds!); please use the table in 3. Our BackFunds partners and their main features to guide your choice.


Please note that these criteria might evolve over time. If anything changes, Back Market will promptly update this article to keep you informed.


*Don’t forget, you can always check your own defect rate (for ‘All conditions’ products) directly in your Back Office: just head to the ‘Insights’ page and look under the ‘Quality’ section (see screenshot below).

 

 

6. BackFunds Toolkit: Key Resources

In this section, you'll find two key assets to help you better evaluate BackFunds and discover just how valuable it can be for your business.

 

  • BackFunds Deck : everything you need to know about BackFunds!
  • BackFunds Simulation Tool : get a clear, upbeat view of the service’s cost plan, monthly and yearly! coming soon!

 

 

7. Get started with BackFunds!

Reach out to our BackFunds partners ​​​​​​​by using the following links:

 

  • Get in touch with Storfund via the specific landing page
  • Connect with Hero through their dedicated landing page
  • Reach out to LinkLogis via your SSM or the SSC Form


For any questions regarding BackFunds, you can contact the BackFunds provider directly (see above links).
